name: io.github.jyswee/isp2go
description: ISP management for coding agents. Customers, billing, networking, tickets, RICA/POPIA compliance. 20 tools, stdio or remote SSE.

environmentVariables.name: ISP2GO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ISP2Go API key (isk_...). Optional: without a key the server starts in onboarding mode and can self-signup via the isp signup command.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using your ISP2Go API key: 'Bearer isk_...'. Optional: without one the server starts in onboarding mode and can self-signup via the isp2go_signup tool.
